judgment.reason: Samsung Electronics DS has official role taxonomy and broad semiconductor business context across memory, System LSI, foundry, advanced packaging, manufacturing infrastructure, and AI/data-center memory solutions.

industry_knowledge.copilot_use: Connect to memory process, package development, evaluation, reliability, power efficiency, and AI/HPC workload context.
Connect to memory expansion, memory pooling, server/datacenter workloads, system software, firmware, and product strategy.
Connect to process technology, customer requirements, PPA, yield, advanced nodes, and application-specific manufacturing.
Connect to I-Cube, H-Cube, X-Cube, turnkey service, heterogeneous integration, thermal/electrical/mechanical reliability.

do: Ask the target DS business unit and role before giving detailed advice.
Translate user experience into role-specific metrics such as yield, reliability, process stability, equipment uptime, or package performance.
Separate Samsung DS-specific context from generic semiconductor advice.
Use SK hynix comparison only when it clarifies common semiconductor role patterns.
avoid: Do not give generic Samsung application advice without role targeting.
Do not force HBM4 into every role.
Do not mix DX/mobile/consumer electronics context with DS semiconductor context.
Do not summarize technology news without connecting it to job duties.
